prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, NFLX has an annualized volatility of approximately 35-40%. For a 2-day period, this translates to roughly 2-3% daily standard deviation. The point estimate assumes no directional bias (random walk). The confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with estimated 2-day volatility of approximately 3.5%, scaled appropriately for each confidence level (67%, 128%, and 165% of one standard deviation respectively).
